facade_description: 305 Augusta Ave presents a house-form, semi-detached facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 3 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its house-form, semi-detached typology. The facade reads primarily as mixed in a charcoal and tan modernized facade with a black storefront base palette, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade keeps a domestic opening rhythm of 1, 2, 1 window bays from lower to upper levels, using mixed, and 1 principal entrance. Character-defining facade elements include original windows, cornice. HCD note: Each property has value as a nineteenth-century House-form building that reflects vernacular interpretations of Victorian architectural styles. Through its construction date and typology, each property is directly associated with the District’s early residential development from the 1850s to the ear
